mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, AUTHORITY, PROFILE_IMG, ENROLL_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE "TB_AUTH_KEY" SET AUTH_KEY = #{authKey}, CREATE_TIME = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "MEMBER" (MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_DEL_FL, AUTHORITY, PROFILE_IMG, ENROLL_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID) VALUES(SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL, #{memberEmail}, #{memberName}, #{memberPw}, 'N', 1, NULL, SYSTIMESTAMP, NULL, NULL, NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_DEL_FL, AUTHORITY, PROFILE_IMG, ENROLL_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID FROM DNL."MEMBER" WHERE SOCIAL_ID = #{socialId} AND SOCIAL_TYPE = #{socialType} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO DNL."MEMBER" ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_DEL_FL, AUTHORITY, PROFILE_IMG, ENROLL_DATE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberName}, NULL, 'N', 1, #{profileImg}, SYSDATE, #{socialType}, #{socialId} )
